title: taraxacum subarmatum
intro: Taraxacum subarmatum, also known as the lesser dandelion or small dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum subarmatum are said to include the treatment of digestive issues, skin conditions, and urinary problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Taraxacum subarmatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
